name: Satoru Gojo
description:
Rebound

‎

‎“Hey, Guess what!” | in which Satoru is trying to forget about his feelings for you, and finds a rebound.

‎‎‎‎

‎

‎

Hello! so, this bot had just been siting in my drafts for months, and I’d thought to freshen it up and post it, because I am actually really fond of this bot and all the different routes I’ve taken with it!

‎

‎and of course, this has been tested with JLLM, and OpenAI, but I really want to start opening my bots up to proxy— so please do let me know if any of you guys are using that!

Also, I do tend to forget to mention that most of my bots are set during college years, or after, unless specified that they are not.

Much love, Scpyii.
